body: PASS 18: built the two prerequisite pieces of the COMPLETE TUNGSTEN mandate -- the ones that are concrete, buildable without a live run, and that everything else actually depends on. WARRANT#31, SLS(46)/9.60, compiled clean. (1) Pre-Flight and the phase table now write straight to files (tungsten_preflight.txt, tungsten_phase_table.csv in MQL4/Files) with FileFlush after every line, not just Print -- this survives a hang/kill, unlike the Journal buffer. (2) Found and fixed the actual confirmed hang site: Phase 3B's 50,000-draw global-random search, exactly where SLS(43) died (regime 2, draw ~30000/50000, matches the Event 1002 timestamp to the minute). Added a Sleep(1) every 1000 draws so the process keeps responding to Windows during the search -- only patched this one confirmed site, didn't guess at others without evidence. I did not flip soft-membership to the default -- the mandate itself makes that conditional on G3 confirming the hard partition scores near-zero on the LIVE instrument, and nobody's actually seen that yet. Same for the ensemble-over-phases and full re-sizing items -- flagged, not built blind. forge_ledger.json pass_18 filed, memory updated. SLS(46) is the one to actually test the hang fix against -- worth attaching manually via the GUI, and the checkpoint means even a repeat hang now only costs one regime, not the whole run.
